name: Out of Sight
description: Adds camera culling to the game. Renders only the objects in camera sight to boost performance.

enable-culling.name: Enable Camera Culling
enable-culling.description: Toggles object culling on or off during gameplay.

culling-margin.name: Culling Margin
culling-margin.description: Additional pixel boundary padding outside the camera view before objects are culled.

debug-culling.name: Debug Draw Culling Bounds
debug-culling.description: Draws a red rectangle showing the current culling boundary, plus tints culled objects' bounding boxes.

ignore-triggers.name: Ignore Triggers
ignore-triggers.description: Prevents triggers and special internal objects from being hidden when out of bounds.

lod-threshold.name: LOD Scale Threshold (fraction of normal size)
